title: Read and interpret property maps and plans
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Read and interpret property maps and plans demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Recognise key components of maps and plans

pcs.text: Identify different types of maps and plans and recognise their purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify different types of maps and plans and recognise their purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify different types of maps and plans and recognise their purpose.

pcs.text: Recognise features and characteristics of different maps and plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise features and characteristics of different maps and plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise features and characteristics of different maps and plans.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify scale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify scale.

pcs.text: Recognise mapping conventions and common symbols from map and plan legends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise mapping conventions and common symbols from map and plan legends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise mapping conventions and common symbols from map and plan legends.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Recognise key components of maps and plans

elements.title: Use information from maps/plans for site

pcs.text: Select map or plan for a specified purpose for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select map or plan for a specified purpose for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select map or plan for a specified purpose for site.

pcs.text: Locate north and orient map/plan to site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate north and orient map/plan to site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate north and orient map/plan to site.

pcs.text: Identify and locate boundaries and structures on site from map/plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate boundaries and structures on site from map/plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate boundaries and structures on site from map/plan.

pcs.text: Identify and locate landmarks and topographic features on site from map/plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate landmarks and topographic features on site from map/plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate landmarks and topographic features on site from map/plan.

pcs.text: Determine distances and areas for specified purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine distances and areas for specified purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine distances and areas for specified purpose.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Use information from maps/plans for site

elements.title: Navigate using maps/plans in field situations

pcs.text: Locate current position and a destination in field from map/plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate current position and a destination in field from map/plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate current position and a destination in field from map/plan.

pcs.text: Locate impediments to navigation from current position to destination for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate impediments to navigation from current position to destination for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate impediments to navigation from current position to destination for site.

pcs.text: Navigate from current position to destination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Navigate from current position to destination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Navigate from current position to destination.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Navigate using maps/plans in field situations

elements.title: Locate features for site using maps and plans in field situations

pcs.text: Identify features to be set out on site from map or plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify features to be set out on site from map or plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify features to be set out on site from map or plan.

pcs.text: Navigate to feature using navigation aids and maps/plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Navigate to feature using navigation aids and maps/plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Navigate to feature using navigation aids and maps/plans.

pcs.text: Mark location of features in the field
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark location of features in the field?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark location of features in the field.

pcs.text: Check accuracy of maps or plan content against site features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check accuracy of maps or plan content against site features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check accuracy of maps or plan content against site features.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Locate features for site using maps and plans in field situations

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
